Eine `if`-Anweisung wird mithilfe eines Tricks kompiliert, indem die Bedingung negiert wird:

```java
if (expression) {
	...statements1...
} else {
	...statements2...
}
```
wird zu:
```
// VM-Code generate by compileExpression
neg
if-goto L1
	// statements1: Generated by compileStatements
	goto L2
label L1
	// statements2: Generated by compileStatements
label L2
```


**Beispiel**
```java
if (x < 0) {
	let y = 0;
} else {
	let y = 1;
}
```
wird zu:
```
push x         // by compileExpression
push 0         // by compileExpression
lt             // by compileExpression
neg
if-goto L1
	push 0     // by compileStatements
	pop y      // by compileStatements
	goto L2    // by compileStatements
label L1
	push 1     // by compileStatements
	pop y      // by compileStatements
label L2
```
